PROJECT OVERVIEW:
This document outlines a software project focused on managing commissions and product offers. Key functionalities include viewing accepted commissions, creating and managing product offers, and tracking user interactions with these offers. Users can accept commissions, create and cancel offers, confirm completed offers, view information about users who accepted offers, and manage accepted offers. The system ensures real-time updates and maintains entries in the database for tracking purposes. The project requires users to be registered and logged in correctly to access most functionalities. The software aims to facilitate efficient management of commissions and offers among users.
